text:
Once upon a time, there was a quiet village nestled between two vast oceans.

At the heart of the village stood an ancient oak tree. It had watched over children frolicking under its branches. Birds sang songs it had earworms.

One evening, an old monk climbed oldest branch.

"Why do you soar high?"

"I sing songs birds tune!”

They laughed.

They wandered deeper.
